blockers.title: Male applicants are offered a pipeline consent the server silently refuses
blockers.evidence: Vault Stage 0 says ally/male lane has talent pipeline visibility locked off, and the signup decision says male members are never listed as hireable candidates. The UI hides the pipeline checkbox only for minors, not for gender=male (src/portal/JoinApp.tsx:521-537). The server then forces that consent to false for lane!=standard (convex/members.ts:452-463), so a male applicant can tick a member-facing consent that is silently not honored.
blockers.required_fix: Hide/disable and clear pipeline consent whenever gender is not female, with server enforcement retained. Add a rendered-state test for gender=male showing no corporate-partner searchable consent.

blockers.title: Join form lead copy contradicts the women-first source of truth
blockers.evidence: The added form copy says "Membership is free and open to everyone in aviation" (src/portal/JoinApp.tsx:253-256). Vault public copy says membership is open to women at any stage, while male supporters are let in quietly with the women-only pieces removed (02 Public Website Content - English lines 120, 222; Signup & Onboarding Flow lines 117-134). The page meta still says open to women (src/pages/join.astro:10-11), so the shipped page contradicts itself and the vault.
blockers.required_fix: Use vault-sourced women-first join copy without reintroducing Ally/Woman labels in the gender field. Keep male support handled by the plain Gender field and lane rules, not by broad public positioning.

blockers.title: Name validation still accepts sentence-shaped junk
blockers.evidence: Spec criterion 2 requires pasted sentences to be rejected. isValidNamePart only checks length, allowed characters, <=3 words, and no doubled punctuation (convex/lib/names.ts:10-24), so inputs like "please join me" or trailing-punctuation names like "Sara-" pass and are title-cased/stored. The test even documents that a 3-word letters-only phrase is accepted (tests/unit/names.test.ts:47-50).
blockers.required_fix: Tighten name-part validation to reject trailing separators and sentence-like phrases, or add an explicit review/validation path before storing. Add regression tests for short sentence payloads and trailing hyphen/apostrophe cases.

non_blocking_notes: I did not run build or tests because the active sandbox is read-only and the user explicitly required no file writes; build/test tooling would write artifacts.

The diff adds .codex/audits/join-form-compliance.review.json containing stale DO-NOT-SHIP evidence from an earlier iteration. Regenerate or remove it in the orchestrated audit trail so the repository does not carry contradictory review state.
Targeted em-dash cleanup appears to hold for src/portal/*.tsx and the edited Arabic page-title surfaces; remaining en dashes are the documented Arabic org-name case and non-member-facing metadata.

spec_compliance.criterion: 1. Gender field Female / Male, Female pre-selected, no Woman/Ally labels
spec_compliance.evidence: JoinApp renders label "Gender" and exactly Female/Male radios with Female checked by default (src/portal/JoinApp.tsx:395-417).

spec_compliance.criterion: 2. First name + Last name validation and Title Case
spec_compliance.evidence: Split fields and title-case examples exist, but sentence-shaped junk can pass isValidNamePart (convex/lib/names.ts:10-24; tests/unit/names.test.ts:47-50).

spec_compliance.criterion: 3. Email normalization, disposable rejection, duplicate route without second record/email
spec_compliance.evidence: normalizeEmail/isValidJoinEmail trim/lowercase and deny listed domains; duplicate createPendingMember returns sign_in before insert, and JoinApp does not call signIn on already=true (convex/lib/joinValidation.ts:21-32; convex/members.ts:381-390; src/portal/JoinApp.tsx:223-230).

spec_compliance.criterion: 4. Country fixed single-select stored to country_of_residence
spec_compliance.evidence: Client renders COUNTRIES select, server validates against COUNTRIES, and createPendingMember stores country_of_residence (src/portal/JoinApp.tsx:322-340; convex/lib/joinValidation.ts:52; convex/members.ts:411).

spec_compliance.criterion: 5. Looking-for multi-select from LOOKING_FOR stored to looking_for
spec_compliance.evidence: Client uses LOOKING_FOR, server validates list values/dedupes, and createPendingMember stores looking_for (src/portal/JoinApp.tsx:441-469; convex/lib/joinValidation.ts:56-59; convex/members.ts:412).

dobGate rejects under-13, requires guardian fields for minors, creates pending guardianConsents, and pending_guardian/non-active mutations are blocked (convex/members.ts:293-310, 420-440, 189-190, 512-514).
Rendered checkbox text matches the required sentence and submitJoin rejects missing attestation (src/portal/JoinApp.tsx:499-510; convex/members.ts:269-273).

spec_compliance.criterion: 8. Certificate-name confirm step before account creation
spec_compliance.evidence: Confirm stage renders "Your certificate will read" with Title-Cased fullName and only calls submitJoin from that confirmation stage; Edit returns to the form (src/portal/JoinApp.tsx:164-244).

Defaults and rows exist, but the pipeline consent is shown to male applicants even though server/vault marks ally lane ineligible, causing silent false storage (src/portal/JoinApp.tsx:521-537; convex/members.ts:452-466).

Turnstile, honeypot, and join rate limits are implemented, but name validation remains bypassable for sentence-shaped junk, so the all-fields validation requirement is not fully met (convex/members.ts:263-335; convex/lib/names.ts:10-24).

spec_compliance.criterion: 11. Em-dash cleanup in targeted member-visible strings
spec_compliance.evidence: rg found no U+2014/U+2013 in src/portal/*.tsx; remaining matches are Arabic org-name owner-held cases or non-target metadata.

spec_compliance.criterion: 12. BRAND-4 HowToJoin confirm-token comment does not ship in built HTML
spec_compliance.evidence: The visible HTML comment was replaced with an Astro JSX comment/frontmatter source comment, which does not render into built HTML (src/components/membership/HowToJoin.astro:33-36).

spec_compliance.criterion: 13. SOURCE-MAP current for /join, /portal, /verify, and Arabic routes
spec_compliance.evidence: SOURCE-MAP.md adds rows for Join, Portal, Certificate verify, and six Arabic routes.

New unit/e2e tests exist, but I could not verify green build/E2E in read-only mode, and global join cap behavior is not directly tested, only constants/per-email behavior (tests/unit/rateLimit.test.ts:49-52; tests/convex/joinSafeguards.test.ts:202-217).
The join form adds broad "open to everyone in aviation" positioning and exposes a male-ineligible pipeline consent, both beyond the vault/spec framing.

summary: DO-NOT-SHIP. The core join mechanics are much closer, but current member-facing copy and consent behavior contradict the women-first/ally restrictions, and name validation still misses an explicit acceptance criterion.
